raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased a laptop computer from XXXX XXXX in XX/XX/XXXX. The cost of the laptop was {$2300.00}. I paid for the laptop on my XXXX  XXXX XXXX  XXXX. The charge appeared as " pending '' for several months. I called Citicard on XXXX XXXX, asking why the charge was not going through. The agent told me that she was not able to see any pending charges. If it wasn't going through she said to contact the merchant and have it run the charge again. 

I did call XXXX and the charge for the {$2300.00} payment successfully posted to my Citicard on XXXX XXXX. A duplicate {$2300.00} charge posted to my Citicard on XXXX XXXX. 

I filed a dispute with Citicard through the online portal in XX/XX/XXXX, and a provisional credit was applied to my account. Citicard responded XXXX, that it needed proof that my purchase was paid using a method other than my account, and again on XXXX, saying my dispute had been concluded and it was unable to resolve the dispute in my favor. 

I have place several telephone calls with, and sent correspondence to Citcard and/or XXXX XXXX multiple times to resolve this matter. See below for the specific dates/times : : XXXX, XXXX - Explaining that duplicate charge was not paid by a different payment method. Both were made to my Citicard. I never communicated that payment was done by a different method. 
XXXX, XXXX - Called to find out what was going on with the dispute. I reiterated that the charge was not paid by a different method. 
XXXX dated letter from Citicard stating XXXX was unable to resolve the dispute XXXX - Prepared letter to Citicard and XXXX XXXX XXXX - Email to Citicard Billing Disputes attaching email correspondence from XXXX received XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX Called again to reopen the dispute. Citicard denied receiving my XXXX email. Sent a follow-up email attaching the email correspondence from XXXX. 
XXXX, XXXX - Called again to reopen the dispute. 
XXXX - Citicard letter denying dispute stating, " We have made every attempt to resolve your dispute with the merchant. They are unwilling to issue a credit to your account and have informed us that this charge is valid... '' I called XXXX XXXX on : XXXX, XXXX - Inquired about my order and the duplicate charge XXXX, XXXX - Call to once again inquire about duplicate charge. asked for documentation showing what payment XXXX had received for the order.
